summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow gamification features (iteration 2). All backend APIs (59/59) and frontend features are working correctly. Successfully verified full gamification system with XP/coins/levels, competition system with AI rewards engine, schools with leaderboards, store with Coming Soon items, premium subscription, AI template builder, and enhanced community features.
passed_tests: User registration with gamification fields (XP, coins, level, premium status)
Task progress slider (0-100) with XP rewards system
Competition creation with type and difficulty selection
Competition joining and submission with AI rewards engine
AI rewards calculation based on accuracy, speed, difficulty, and placement
Schools creation and joining with leaderboard functionality
Class creation within schools
Daily missions auto-generation with XP and coin rewards
Mission claiming system with reward distribution
Store items with multiple categories and Coming Soon badges
Premium subscription system with benefits
AI template generation with GPT-5.1 integration
Template management and editing
Enhanced community features: shared resources, group goals, collaborative notes
Server creation with enhanced tabs (resources, goals, notes)
Group goal creation and contribution system
Collaborative note creation and editing
Gamification statistics in user profile
XP/Level progress display in sidebar
Gradient hero headers on all major pages
Landing page and authentication flow
Navigation between all pages
Visual improvements with gradient backgrounds
Premium badge display for premium users
Coins display throughout the application
